overall.description: Aerial helicopter flight over Rome during golden hour with hazy atmospheric conditions, showcasing urban landscape and a large stadium. The footage is rendered in a flight simulator with a cockpit view showing instrument panels.

segments.scene_description: View from helicopter cockpit flying over hazy terrain with instrument panel visible in foreground. The text 'Rome' appears on screen as the city skyline becomes visible through the golden-hour haze.

segments.scene_description: A large stadium structure comes into view on the right and grows larger as the helicopter passes by. The urban landscape continues below with hazy hills visible in the distance beyond the city limits.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous aerial flight from a helicopter cockpit, beginning in a hazy atmosphere and progressing over the dense urban expanse of Rome toward a prominent landmark. It begins with the instrument panel in the foreground as the city skyline first emerges through a golden-hour haze. As the helicopter advances, the view expands over the dense urban fabric, revealing organized street patterns and a mix of residential architectural styles. The scene then shifts toward the horizon where distant hills become visible, accompanied by a slight banking motion of the aircraft. Finally, the camera passes a large stadium structure that grows in scale on the right while the hazy city limits stretch out toward the far hills.
